flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Shoals Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northwest Shoals Community College rose 31% between 2009 and 2010 (5.1% → 6.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northwest Shoals Community College rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 (10.7% → 12.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwest Shoals Community College fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.5k → $10.0k).
